subcodes.title: Words spoken at hotel suite in New York, 1912-05-31
subcodes.first_line: Today, I would like to introduce you to Áqa Mírza Valíyu’llah Khan. This young man was the son of Áqa Mírza Varqa
subcodes.first_line_orig: امروز میخواهم آقامیرزا ولی الله خان را بشما معرفی کنم
